details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia page, correctly handled the rowspan table structure to extract all co-laureates, and reported complete results. For 2024 (Hopfield & Hinton) and 2023 (Agostini, Krausz, L'Huillier), results match the known facts exactly. The agent also reported 2025 as the most recent year (consistent with today's date of April 2026), with all co-laureates listed. All years include complete laureate lists with no partial answers.
